untranslatable_reason: Signal requires domain-specific inputs not available in allowed indicators: (1) Days to earnings announcement — requires earnings calendar data not in price/technical indicator set; (2) IV percentile and expected IV target percentile — requires implied volatility surface and historical IV percentile ranking data; (3) Vega/gamma/theta P&L tracking — requires derivatives Greeks calculation engine; (4) IV expansion prediction — requires volatility forecasting model. The core logic (buy low IV before expected rise, exit on earnings/theta decay) cannot be fully expressed with only price action and hvol_20/india_vix proxies.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used hvol_20 < india_vix as a weak substitute for 'current IV percentile < threshold' and 'HV < IV spread', with exit when relationship reverses. However, this misses critical earnings timing, IV percentile calibration, and P&L attribution to Greeks. This signal is fundamentally untranslatable without options data integration.
